pages.text: Killing a frog drops 1-2 Raw Frog Legs, more with Looting. Any frog does it, vanilla or yours. Cook them in a furnace, smoker, or campfire, or kill a frog while it is on fire and it drops them already Cooked. Raw is chicken-tier food; cooked fills more.
Cooked Frog Legs, a bowl, and a red and a brown mushroom make Frog Legs Soup - a bigger meal that stacks to one, like any stew. On a skyblock where animals are scarce, your frogs are also your meat.
